parameters.query:
SELECT
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'NEW') as funnel_new,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'CONTACTED') as funnel_contacted,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'IN_CONVERSATION') as funnel_in_conv,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'QUALIFIED') as funnel_qualified,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'ONBOARDING') as funnel_onboarding,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'WON') as funnel_won,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'COLD') as funnel_cold,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'LOST') as funnel_lost,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'DISCARDED') as funnel_discarded,
  count(*) as total
FROM outreach_leads;

SELECT
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'CONTACTED' AND updated_at > now() - interval '7 days') as contacted_this_week,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'IN_CONVERSATION' AND updated_at > now() - interval '7 days') as conversations_this_week,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'QUALIFIED' AND qualified_at > now() - interval '7 days') as qualified_this_week,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'ONBOARDING' AND updated_at > now() - interval '7 days') as onboarding_this_week,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'WON' AND won_at > now() - interval '7 days') as won_this_week,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'LOST' AND lost_at > now() - interval '7 days') as lost_this_week,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE hot_lead = true AND status NOT IN ('WON','LOST','COLD','DISCARDED')) as hot_leads_active
FROM outreach_leads;

SELECT
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE direction = 'outbound') as msgs_sent_week,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE direction = 'inbound') as msgs_received_week,
  count(DISTINCT lead_id) FILTER (WHERE direction = 'inbound') as unique_responders,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE direction = 'outbound' AND channel = 'whatsapp') as wa_sent,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE processing_status = 'error') as errors_week
FROM outreach_logs
WHERE created_at > now() - interval '7 days';

SELECT
  ROUND(
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'WON')::numeric / 
    NULLIF(count(*) FILTER (WHERE status != 'NEW'), 0) * 100, 2
  ) as conversion_rate,
  ROUND(
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('IN_CONVERSATION','QUALIFIED','ONBOARDING'))::numeric / 
    NULLIF(count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'CONTACTED'), 0) * 100, 2
  ) as engagement_rate,
  ROUND(AVG(ai_engagement_score) FILTER (WHERE ai_engagement_score > 0), 1) as avg_ai_score,
  ROUND(AVG(followup_count) FILTER (WHERE status = 'WON'), 1) as avg_followups_to_win
FROM outreach_leads;

SELECT name, phone, email, status, ai_engagement_score, hot_lead, updated_at
FROM outreach_leads
WHERE hot_lead = true
  AND status NOT IN ('WON', 'LOST', 'COLD', 'DISCARDED')
ORDER BY ai_engagement_score DESC
LIMIT 10;

meta.description: Cron Lunes 9:00 ART. Genera reporte semanal con: funnel snapshot, actividad 7d, métricas de mensajería, KPIs de conversión, top hot leads. Envía por WhatsApp al número de alertas.
